metadata.title:
STORK JOKER in


EQUAL SUFFRAGE

Qualification of One Child Per Vote Raises


Furore in Olympia Lobby.

pages.raw_text:
hands of the bill clerk. He has
carefully withheld his name from
the document and the clerk is
pledged to secrecy. The an
nouncement threw the woman suf-
frage lobby into a ferment. Sew
eral of them have no children, and
a person who didn't care for con-
sequences might doubt their
chances of ever complying with
the qualifications suggested. One
and all, however, are indignant,
insisting that the bill is nothing
more or less than an attempt (they
sniff here) to belittle their move.
ment and make them appear
ridiculous.


The woman suffrage bill has a
decidedly fair chance Of passage
if the popularity occasioned by this
new one does not kill it. The
house has been polled and the
women have a majority. What is
more astounding. the senate seems
disposed to hearken to the cry for
the ballot.
